flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Saint Louis Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.7% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Saint Louis Community College rose 21% between 2023 and 2024 (17.7% → 21.3%).
